features: HIGH SPEED DATA SYNC: The Status USB A to 8 Pin Charge Cable delivers 5W high speed data transfer, ensuring your devices charge quickly and sync efficiently. Perfect for smartphones, tablets, and similar devices, this cable combines speed with reliability.Perfect Compatibility

DURABLE AND LONG LASTING DESIGN: Built with a premium silver and white braided coating and reinforced connectors, this charge cable is designed to withstand daily use. Its durable construction ensures it remains reliable over time, making it a practical choice for your devices.

IDEAL FOR CHARGING AND DATA TRANSFER: Whether you need to charge your device or transfer files, this cable provides fast, efficient performance. Its 2 metre length offers flexibility and convenience, allowing you to use your device while it charges.

COMPATIBLE WITH MULTIPLE DEVICES: This charge cable is designed to work with a wide range of devices, including smartphones, tablets, and other compatible electronics. Its versatility makes it a must have accessory for everyday use.

GREAT VALUE PACK OF 1: This pack includes one high quality USB A to 8 Pin Charge Cable, offering excellent value. Whether for home, work, or travel, this cable keeps your devices powered and connected.
